## ERT1.2. Rate of planning via available airspace structures (PI#10)

FINLAND reports that:

-   The ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **13.32%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

-   The ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **30.45%** (via available conditional routes -- CDR)

*[Comment]{.underline}*

*Finland does not have this data, data provided by NM*
